description: 15-person group. Planner proposes dates + cost in opening pitch. People self-remove gracefully (not STOP). Off-topic messages, compliments to organizer, partial availability, slang. Based on real Shasta houseboat text.

messages._note: INTRO: planner opens group with name + destination
INTRO: p2 gives just a name

messages.body: Bless you Bri for being an organizer. Also love the use of rustic
messages._note: Compliment to organizer — should NOT generate a trip-related response

messages.body: +1, thank you for planning! Won't be able to make it but have so much fun!
messages._note: GRACEFUL OPT-OUT: should mark as opted_out WITHOUT harsh STOP response

messages.body: Have to remove myself due to other travel but bless you for coordinating
I'd like to propose the weekend of 9/12 - like this if interested!
Also flexible weekend of 9/5 if better
messages._note: DECIDING_DATES: planner offers ALTERNATIVE dates — should track both

messages.body: A Bri bday boat I c u
messages._note: Slang message — not a date vote, should be ignored
Playful response — not a trip decision

messages.body: bri you planning rockstar. i'm sadly out for the first two wks for sept!
messages._note: PARTIAL AVAILABILITY: not a full opt-out, it's a date constraint

messages.body: Hi! Are you at Dolores for the protest?
messages._note: COMPLETELY OFF-TOPIC: should be ignored entirely

messages.body: Hi! I'm out of town at the river this weekend
messages._note: OFF-TOPIC: not related to the trip planning

messages.body: Price pp will depend on exact #s but it looks to be less than $200 pp for the weekend for the boat
messages._note: BUDGET INFO: planner shares cost estimate — should be stored as preliminary budget
Status check: should show correct participant count after removals
